lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰ ਕਾ ਸਬਦੁ ਨ ਚੀਨੑਹੀ ਤਤੁ ਸਾਰੁ ਨਿਰੰਤਰ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: gur kaa sabad na cheenahee tat saar nirantar |3|
lines.english: They do not understand the Word of the Guru's Shabad, and the essence of excellence within them. ||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਜੋਗੀ ਭੋਗੀ ਕਾਪੜੀ ਕਿਆ ਭਵਹਿ ਦਿਸੰਤਰ ॥
lines.translit: jogee bhogee kaaparree kiaa bhaveh disantar |
lines.english: Why do the Yogis, the revellers, and the beggars wander in foreign lands?

lines.gurmukhi: ਅੰਤਰਿ ਵਸਤੁ ਨ ਜਾਣਨੑੀ ਘਟਿ ਬ੍ਰਹਮੁ ਲੁਕਾਣਾ ॥੪॥
lines.translit: antar vasat na jaananaee ghatt braham lukaanaa |4|
lines.english: do not know what is within; God is hidden deep within them. ||4||

lines.gurmukhi: ਇਕਿ ਤਪਸੀ ਬਨ ਮਹਿ ਤਪੁ ਕਰਹਿ ਨਿਤ ਤੀਰਥ ਵਾਸਾ ॥
lines.translit: eik tapasee ban meh tap kareh nit teerath vaasaa |
lines.english: Some penitents perform penance in the forests, and some dwell forever at sacred shrines.

lines.gurmukhi: ਪੰਡਿਤ ਪਾਧੇ ਜੋਇਸੀ ਨਿਤ ਪੜ੍ਹਹਿ ਪੁਰਾਣਾ ॥
lines.translit: panddit paadhe joeisee nit parrheh puraanaa |
lines.english: The Pandits, the religious scholars, the teachers and astrologers, and those who endlessly read the Puraanas,

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਪੁ ਨ ਚੀਨਹਿ ਤਾਮਸੀ ਕਾਹੇ ਭਏ ਉਦਾਸਾ ॥੫॥
lines.translit: aap na cheeneh taamasee kaahe bhe udaasaa |5|
lines.english: The unenlightened people do not understand themselves - why have they become renunciates? ||5||

lines.gurmukhi: ਇਕਿ ਬਿੰਦੁ ਜਤਨ ਕਰਿ ਰਾਖਦੇ ਸੇ ਜਤੀ ਕਹਾਵਹਿ ॥
lines.translit: eik bind jatan kar raakhade se jatee kahaaveh |
lines.english: Some control their sexual energy, and are known as celibates.

lines.gurmukhi: ਇਕਿ ਗਿਰਹੀ ਸੇਵਕ ਸਾਧਿਕਾ ਗੁਰਮਤੀ ਲਾਗੇ ॥
lines.translit: eik girahee sevak saadhikaa guramatee laage |
lines.english: Some are householders, servants, and seekers, attached to the Guru's Teachings.

lines.gurmukhi: ਬਿਨੁ ਗੁਰਸਬਦ ਨ ਛੂਟਹੀ ਭ੍ਰਮਿ ਆਵਹਿ ਜਾਵਹਿ ॥੬॥
lines.translit: bin gurasabad na chhoottahee bhram aaveh jaaveh |6|
lines.english: But without the Guru's Word, they are not saved, and they wander in reincarnation. ||6||

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰ ਤੇ ਦਰੁ ਘਰੁ ਜਾਣੀਐ ਸੋ ਜਾਇ ਸਿਞਾਣੈ ॥
lines.translit: gur te dar ghar jaaneeai so jaae siyaanai |
lines.english: Through the Guru, the Gate of the Lord's Home is found, and that place is recognized.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਮੁ ਦਾਨੁ ਇਸਨਾਨੁ ਦ੍ਰਿੜੁ ਹਰਿ ਭਗਤਿ ਸੁ ਜਾਗੇ ॥੭॥
lines.translit: naam daan isanaan drirr har bhagat su jaage |7|
lines.english: They hold fast to the Naam, to charity, to cleansing and purification; they remain awake in devotion to the Lord. ||7||

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਨਾਮੁ ਨ ਵੀਸਰੈ ਸਾਚੇ ਮਨੁ ਮਾਨੈ ॥੮॥੧੪॥
lines.translit: naanak naam na veesarai saache man maanai |8|14|
lines.english: Nanak does not forget the Naam; his mind has surrendered to the True Lord. ||8||14||

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਸਾ ਮਹਲਾ ੧ ॥
lines.translit: aasaa mahalaa 1 |
lines.english: Aasaa, First Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਨਸਾ ਮਨਹਿ ਸਮਾਇਲੇ ਭਉਜਲੁ ਸਚਿ ਤਰਣਾ ॥
lines.translit: manasaa maneh samaaeile bhaujal sach taranaa |
lines.english: Stilling the desires of the mind, the mortal truly crosses over the terrifying world-ocean.

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਦਿ ਜੁਗਾਦਿ ਦਇਆਲੁ ਤੂ ਠਾਕੁਰ ਤੇਰੀ ਸਰਣਾ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: aad jugaad deaal too tthaakur teree saranaa |1|
lines.english: In the very beginning, and throughout the ages, You have been the Merciful Lord and Master; I seek Your Sanctuary. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਨਾਮੁ ਧਿਆਈਐ ਮਨ ਮੰਦਰੁ ਭੀਜੈ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: guramukh naam dhiaaeeai man mandar bheejai |1| rahaau |
lines.english: The Gurmukh meditates on the Naam; the temple of his mind resounds with joy. ||1||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਤੂ ਦਾਤੌ ਹਮ ਜਾਚਿਕਾ ਹਰਿ ਦਰਸਨੁ ਦੀਜੈ ॥
lines.translit: too daatau ham jaachikaa har darasan deejai |
lines.english: You are the Giver, and I am a mere beggar. Lord, please grant me the Blessed Vision of Your Darshan.

lines.gurmukhi: ਕੂੜਾ ਲਾਲਚੁ ਛੋਡੀਐ ਤਉ ਸਾਚੁ ਪਛਾਣੈ ॥
lines.translit: koorraa laalach chhoddeeai tau saach pachhaanai |
lines.english: Renouncing false greed, one comes to realize the Truth.

lines.gurmukhi: ਇਹੁ ਮਨੁ ਰਾਜਾ ਲੋਭੀਆ ਲੁਭਤਉ ਲੋਭਾਈ ॥
lines.translit: eihu man raajaa lobheea lubhtau lobhaaee |
lines.english: This mind is a greedy king, engrossed in greed.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰ ਕੈ ਸਬਦਿ ਸਮਾਈਐ ਪਰਮਾਰਥੁ ਜਾਣੈ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: gur kai sabad samaaeeai paramaarath jaanai |2|
lines.english: So let yourself be absorbed in the Word of the Guru's Shabad, and know this supreme realization. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਲਰਿ ਖੇਤੀ ਬੀਜੀਐ ਕਿਉ ਲਾਹਾ ਪਾਵੈ ॥
lines.translit: kalar khetee beejeeai kiau laahaa paavai |
lines.english: Planting the seeds in the rocky soil, how can one reap a profit?

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਲੋਭੁ ਨਿਵਾਰੀਐ ਹਰਿ ਸਿਉ ਬਣਿ ਆਈ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: guramukh lobh nivaareeai har siau ban aaee |3|
lines.english: The Gurmukh eliminates his greed, and comes to an understanding with the Lord. ||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਲਾਲਚੁ ਛੋਡਹੁ ਅੰਧਿਹੋ ਲਾਲਚਿ ਦੁਖੁ ਭਾਰੀ ॥
lines.translit: laalach chhoddahu andhiho laalach dukh bhaaree |
lines.english: So renounce greed - you are blind! Greed only brings pain.

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਨਮੁਖੁ ਸਚਿ ਨ ਭੀਜਈ ਕੂੜੁ ਕੂੜਿ ਗਡਾਵੈ ॥੪॥
lines.translit: manamukh sach na bheejee koorr koorr gaddaavai |4|
lines.english: The self-willed manmukh is not pleased with Truth; the false are buried in falsehood. ||4||

lines.gurmukhi: ਦੁਬਿਧਾ ਛੋਡਿ ਕੁਵਾਟੜੀ ਮੂਸਹੁਗੇ ਭਾਈ ॥
lines.translit: dubidhaa chhodd kuvaattarree moosahuge bhaaee |
lines.english: Renounce the evil way of duality, or you shall be plundered, O Siblings of Destiny.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਾਚੌ ਸਾਹਿਬੁ ਮਨਿ ਵਸੈ ਹਉਮੈ ਬਿਖੁ ਮਾਰੀ ॥੫॥
lines.translit: saachau saahib man vasai haumai bikh maaree |5|
lines.english: When the True Lord dwells within the mind, the poisonous ego is conquered. ||5||

lines.gurmukhi: ਅਹਿਨਿਸਿ ਨਾਮੁ ਸਲਾਹੀਐ ਸਤਿਗੁਰ ਸਰਣਾਈ ॥੬॥
lines.translit: ahinis naam salaaheeai satigur saranaaee |6|
lines.english: Day and night, praise the Naam, in the Sanctuary of the True Guru's protection. ||6||

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਨਮੁਖ ਪਥਰੁ ਸੈਲੁ ਹੈ ਧ੍ਰਿਗੁ ਜੀਵਣੁ ਫੀਕਾ ॥
lines.translit: manamukh pathar sail hai dhrig jeevan feekaa |
lines.english: The self-willed manmukh is a rock, a stone. His life is cursed and useless.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਨਾਮੁ ਨ ਵੀਸਰੈ ਮਥਿ ਅੰਮ੍ਰਿਤੁ ਪੀਆ ॥੮॥੧੫॥
lines.translit: naanak naam na veesarai math amrit peea |8|15|
lines.english: O Nanak, one who does not forget the Naam, churns and drinks in the Ambrosial Nectar. ||8||15||

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਕਾ ਨਾਮੁ ਨਿਧਾਨੁ ਹੈ ਪੂਰੈ ਗੁਰਿ ਦੀਆ ॥
lines.translit: har kaa naam nidhaan hai poorai gur deea |
lines.english: The Name of the Lord is the treasure; the Perfect Guru has given it to me.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਲ ਮਹਿ ਕੇਤਾ ਰਾਖੀਐ ਅਭ ਅੰਤਰਿ ਸੂਕਾ ॥੭॥
lines.translit: jal meh ketaa raakheeai abh antar sookaa |7|
lines.english: No matter now long a stone is kept under water, it still remains dry at its core. ||7||

lines.gurmukhi: ਧੰਧੁ ਪਿਟੇ ਸੰਸਾਰੁ ਸਚੁ ਨ ਭਾਇਆ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: dhandh pitte sansaar sach na bhaaeaa |1|
lines.english: The world is engrossed in its entanglements, and does not appreciate the Truth. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਸਾ ਮਹਲਾ ੧ ॥
lines.translit: aasaa mahalaa 1 |
lines.english: Aasaa, First Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਚਲੇ ਚਲਣਹਾਰ ਵਾਟ ਵਟਾਇਆ ॥
lines.translit: chale chalanahaar vaatt vattaaeaa |
lines.english: The travellers travel from one road to another.

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਿਆ ਭਵੀਐ ਕਿਆ ਢੂਢੀਐ ਗੁਰ ਸਬਦਿ ਦਿਖਾਇਆ ॥
lines.translit: kiaa bhaveeai kiaa dtoodteeai gur sabad dikhaaeaa |
lines.english: Why wander around, and why go searching, when the Guru's Shabad reveals Him to us?

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਮਤਾ ਮੋਹੁ ਵਿਸਰਜਿਆ ਅਪਨੈ ਘਰਿ ਆਇਆ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: mamataa mohu visarajiaa apanai ghar aaeaa |1| rahaau |
lines.english: Leaving behind egotism and attachment, I have arrived at my own home. ||1||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਚੇ ਸਿਉ ਚਿਤੁ ਲਾਇ ਬਹੁੜਿ ਨ ਆਈਐ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: sache siau chit laae bahurr na aaeeai |2|
lines.english: Centering your consciousness on the True Lord, you shall not have to come into the world again. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਚਿ ਮਿਲੈ ਸਚਿਆਰੁ ਕੂੜਿ ਨ ਪਾਈਐ ॥
lines.translit: sach milai sachiaar koorr na paaeeai |
lines.english: Through Truth, one meets the True One; He is not obtained through falsehood.

lines.gurmukhi: ਰੋਵਹੁ ਸਚੁ ਸਲਾਹਿ ਹੁਕਮੁ ਪਛਾਣਹੂ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: rovahu sach salaeh hukam pachhaanahoo |3|
lines.english: Weep by praising the True Lord, and recognize His Command. ||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਮੋਇਆ ਕਉ ਕਿਆ ਰੋਵਹੁ ਰੋਇ ਨ ਜਾਣਹੂ ॥
lines.translit: moeaa kau kiaa rovahu roe na jaanahoo |
lines.english: Why do you weep for the dead? You do not know how to weep.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹੁਕਮੀ ਵਜਹੁ ਲਿਖਾਇ ਆਇਆ ਜਾਣੀਐ ॥
lines.translit: hukamee vajahu likhaae aaeaa jaaneeai |
lines.english: Blessed is the birth of one who is destined to abide by the Lord's Command.

lines.gurmukhi: ਲਾਹਾ ਪਲੈ ਪਾਇ ਹੁਕਮੁ ਸਿਞਾਣੀਐ ॥੪॥
lines.translit: laahaa palai paae hukam siyaaneeai |4|
lines.english: He obtains the true profit, realizing the Lord's Command. ||4||
